description:
7-Eleven extends their existing digital ledger and point-of-sale (POS) systems with a mobile-based digital wallet. 7-Eleven leverages API Gateway, AWS Lambda, AWS SQS, and AWS EventBridge to build an extensible, event-driven-architecture.

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS​​​ cloud:
http://amzn.to/2ZIbygO​

#AWS #ThisIsMyArchitecture
fulltitle: 7-Eleven: Innovation with Serverless for Cash-Based Digital Wallet
